privileged_info_summary: The Snipe-IT configuration changes are synthetically generated and dictated by the task description. The expected site name ('Global Retail Assets'), currency ('GBP'), support email ('it-support@globalretail.com'), and header color ('#0055A4') exactly match the explicit instructions provided to the agent.
